title: Human-AI Interaction Design

modules.title: User Experience with AI
modules.sub: Mapping how people perceive and engage with AI systems
modules.description: Learners analyze real-world AI interfaces to identify what makes them intuitive or frustrating for end users. They apply UX research methods adapted for AI contexts, including mental model mapping and task flow analysis. By the end, they produce a UX audit of an existing AI-powered product with actionable improvement recommendations.

modules.title: Trust and Transparency
modules.sub: Building user confidence through honest, explainable AI design
modules.description: Learners examine the psychological and design factors that cause users to trust or distrust AI outputs. They evaluate transparency mechanisms such as confidence indicators, explainability panels, and error disclosures across case studies. They then design a transparency framework for a chosen AI feature, balancing honesty with usability.

modules.title: Interaction Design Principles
modules.sub: Applying core design principles to human-AI touchpoints
modules.description: Learners work through established interaction design heuristics and adapt them specifically for AI-driven interfaces where outputs are probabilistic or dynamic. They prototype key interaction patterns, such as AI suggestions, overrides, and feedback loops, using low-fidelity wireframes. The module culminates in a design critique session where learners evaluate each other's prototypes against defined AI interaction standards.

modules.title: Collaborative Intelligence
modules.sub: Designing systems where humans and AI augment each other
modules.description: Learners explore models of human-AI collaboration that leverage the complementary strengths of both, moving beyond simple automation toward genuine augmentation. They map decision points in a professional workflow to determine where AI assistance adds value versus where human judgment must remain primary. The module concludes with learners producing a collaborative intelligence blueprint for a workplace scenario relevant to their field.

synopsis: Learn principles for designing effective interactions between humans and AI systems. Explore how to build trust and create intuitive AI-powered experiences.
